scripts.dev: bun run --filter server dev & bun run --filter web dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter server build && bun run --filter web build
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter server check-types && bun run --filter web check-types && bun run --filter @colorir/storage check-types && bun run --filter @colorir/ui check-types
scripts.lint: biome check apps packages docs .aiox package.json biome.json
scripts.test: bun run --filter server test && bun run --filter web test && bun run --filter @colorir/auth test && bun run --filter @colorir/db test && bun run --filter @colorir/env test && bun run --filter @colorir/storage test && bun run --filter @colorir/ui test
scripts.test:run: bun run --filter server test:run && bun run --filter web test:run && bun run --filter @colorir/auth test:run && bun run --filter @colorir/db test:run && bun run --filter @colorir/env test:run && bun run --filter @colorir/storage test:run && bun run --filter @colorir/ui test:run
